title: Opening Invocation to Apedemak
transliteration: apedmk-i : qo : mlo : mk-l : Tanyidamani : pwrite : el-x-te
interlinear_gloss: Apedemak-VOC  great  good  god-DET  Tanyidamani  life  give-x-COP
free_translation: O Apedemak, great and good god — give life to Tanyidamani!
notes: Formula attested on REM 0405A: 'A[pe]dem[k-i] Tneyidmni pwrite el-x-te'. Confidence boosted: matches published transliteration closely.

title: Invocation to Amun
transliteration: amni-i : qo : mlo : mk-l : Tanyidamani : qore-l : pwrite : el-x-te
interlinear_gloss: Amun-VOC  great  good  god-DET  Tanyidamani  ruler-DET  life  give-x-COP
free_translation: O Amun, great and good god — give life to Tanyidamani the ruler!
notes: Parallel formula invoking Amun; 'O Amun, the great and good god, give life to Tanyidamani the ruler'

title: Royal Titulary — Name and Title
transliteration: gore : Tanyidamani : qore-l-o : kdke-l : amni-te : mlo : qo
interlinear_gloss: ruler  Tanyidamani  ruler-DET-GEN  queen.mother-DET  Amun-LOC  good  great
free_translation: The ruler Tanyidamani, of the royal line, and the queen mothers — at Amun's temple, good and great.
notes: 'The ruler Tanyidamani, of the kingship, the Candace's (son), at the temple of Amun, good and great'

title: Royal Lineage
transliteration: lh-l : qore-l : Tanyidamani : s : beke-li : kdke-l : mlo-l-o
interlinear_gloss: offspring-DET  ruler-DET  Tanyidamani  3SG.POSS  beget-PL  queen.mother-DET  good-DET-GEN
free_translation: Offspring of rulers — Tanyidamani, whom the good queen mothers begot.
notes: 'Offspring of the ruler, Tanyidamani, his begetting, of the good Candace's (line)'

title: Royal Authority Formula
transliteration: Amnp : nete : se-mlo-lw : qore-l : Tanyidamani
interlinear_gloss: Amnp  3SG-POSS  VOC-good-TERM  ruler-DET  Tanyidamani
free_translation: Amnp (the Amun-priest?) praises the good — Tanyidamani the ruler.
notes: Attested phrase: 'Amnp nete se-mlo-lw' (Rilly & de Voogt 2012:155). 'Amnp' may be an Amun-related priestly title. 'se-mlo-lw' is a complex form: vocative prefix + 'good' + terminal suffix.

title: Reference to Ancestral Rulers
transliteration: Amnirense : gor : Amanikhabale : gor : qore-l-o : mlo
interlinear_gloss: Amanirenas  ruler  Amanikhabale  ruler  ruler-DET-GEN  good
free_translation: Amanirenas the ruler; Amanikhabale the ruler — of the good royal line.
notes: Attested: 'Amnirense gor' (Rilly & de Voogt 2012:142). 'gor' < *gore-l with determinant reduction, confirmed pattern.

title: Divine Patronage
transliteration: apedmk : mk-se : amni : mk-se : wos : mk-se : selele-wi : tenke
interlinear_gloss: Apedemak  god-VOC  Amun  god-VOC  Isis  god-VOC  protection-DAT  west
free_translation: O Apedemak, O god! O Amun, O god! O Isis, O god! — grant protection in the west!
notes: 'Apedemak the god, Amun the god, Isis the goddess — protection in the west'

title: Enthronement Declaration
transliteration: qore : Tanyidamani : Mnpte-se-lw : qoreyi : mlo-l-o
interlinear_gloss: ruler  Tanyidamani  Napata-VOC-TERM  one.who.rules  good-DET-GEN
free_translation: The ruler Tanyidamani of Napata — he who rules the good.
notes: 'Mnpte' = Napata (the sacred city at Jebel Barkal). 'qoreyi' = participial form 'one who rules' (cf. Rilly 2010).

title: Benediction to Apedemak
transliteration: apedmk-i : qo : mk : mlo : pwrite : Tanyidamani : pesto-b-ke : to : mlo-l-o
interlinear_gloss: Apedemak-VOC  great  god  good  life  Tanyidamani  give-COP-NMLZ  land  good-DET-GEN
free_translation: O Apedemak, great and good god — may life be given to Tanyidamani; may the land be good!
notes: 'O Apedemak, great god, good one — life! To Tanyidamani may it be given in the good land'

title: Benediction to Amun of Napata
transliteration: amni : Mnpte : mk-l : qo : mlo : pwrite : pesto-b-ke : selele
interlinear_gloss: Amun  Napata  god-DET  great  good  life  give-COP-NMLZ  protection
free_translation: O Amun of Napata, great and good god — may life and protection be given!
notes: 'Amun of Napata, the great and good god — life! May protection be given'

title: Benediction to Isis
transliteration: wos-i : mlo : mk : pwrite : Tanyidamani : qore-l : pesto-b-ke : ate-li : yi-li
interlinear_gloss: Isis-VOC  good  god  life  Tanyidamani  ruler-DET  give-COP-NMLZ  bread-PL  water-PL
free_translation: O Isis, good god — may life be given to Tanyidamani the ruler; may bread and water be offered!
notes: 'O Isis, good goddess — life! To Tanyidamani the ruler may bread and water be given'

title: Temple Construction at Jebel Barkal
transliteration: qore-l : Tanyidamani : dmke : amni-te : mke-l-o : mlo : qo : bedewi-l
interlinear_gloss: ruler-DET  Tanyidamani  temple  Amun-LOC  build-DET-GEN  good  great  throne-DET
free_translation: Tanyidamani the ruler built the temple at Amun's place — good and great thrones.
notes: CONJECTURAL. 'dmke' = temple (tentative, cert 0.45). 'mke' = to build (tentative, cert 0.40). 'bedewi' = throne/seat (tentative, cert 0.40). The temple-building motif is expected for a Jebel Barkal stele.

title: Offerings at Jebel Barkal Temple
transliteration: ate-li : yi-li : pesto-b-ke : apedmk : mk-se : amni : mk-se : mlo-l-owi
interlinear_gloss: bread-PL  water-PL  give-COP-NMLZ  Apedemak  god-VOC  Amun  god-VOC  good-DET-FOCUS
free_translation: Bread and water — may they be offered! O Apedemak, O god! O Amun, O good god!
notes: 'Bread and water, may it be given to Apedemak the god, Amun the god — she was of goodness'

title: Ritual Formula
transliteration: plote-l : ate-li : yi-li : s : mk-l : qo : to : amni-te : selele
interlinear_gloss: pour-DET  bread-PL  water-PL  3SG.POSS  god-DET  great  land  Amun-LOC  protection
free_translation: Pour libations — bread and water for the great gods! In the land at Amun's temple — protection!
notes: 'Libation of bread and water, his, to the great god(s) in the land at Amun's (temple), protection'

title: Campaign Declaration
transliteration: qore-l : Tanyidamani : qo : mlo : to : akine : tele-l
interlinear_gloss: ruler-DET  Tanyidamani  great  good  land  Akine  go-DET
free_translation: Tanyidamani, the great and good ruler, marched to the land of Akine.
notes: Military narrative begins. 'tele-l' = 'they marched' (verbal + plural). Akine is a well-attested Lower Nubian province name.

title: Slaughter of the Men — Campaign 1
transliteration: e-ked : abr-se-l : Tanyidamani : qore-l : qo : mlo
interlinear_gloss: 1SG-slaughter  man-DET.PL  Tanyidamani  ruler-DET  great  good
free_translation: I slaughtered the men — I, Tanyidamani, great and good ruler!
notes: ATTESTED. 'e-ked' = '1SG-slaughter': verbal prefix e- (1st person sg.) + ked 'to slaughter' (confirmed by Nastasen stele Egyptian parallel). 'abr-se-l' = 'the men': abr 'man' + -se (determinant) + -l (plural). This is one of the most securely understood verbal forms in Meroitic.

title: Seizure of the Women — Campaign 1
transliteration: erk : kdi-se-l : Tanyidamani : qore-l
interlinear_gloss: seize  woman-DET.PL  Tanyidamani  ruler-DET
free_translation: I seized the women — I, Tanyidamani the ruler!
notes: ATTESTED. 'erk' = 'to seize/raid' (confirmed by Nastasen parallel). 'kdi-se-l' = 'the women': kdi 'woman' + -se (determinant) + -l (plural). 1st person subject carried from e- prefix in preceding C2.

title: Second Campaign — Territory Conquered
transliteration: to : tedke : tkke-l : e-ked : abr-se-l : erk : kdi-se-l : qore-l : Tanyidamani
interlinear_gloss: land  east  conquer-DET  1SG-slaughter  man-DET.PL  seize  woman-DET.PL  ruler-DET  Tanyidamani
free_translation: In the eastern land I conquered: I slaughtered the men, I seized the women — I, Tanyidamani the ruler!
notes: CONJECTURAL. Reconstructed as second campaign passage (east vs. west). 'tedke' = 'east' (cert 0.70, parallel to 'tenke' = 'west', cert 0.80). 'tkke' = 'to conquer' (cert 0.30, most uncertain verb in the stele).

title: Prisoners and Spoils
transliteration: abr-se-wi : kdi-se-wi : lh-l : ar : nobe : qo : qore-l : pesto-b-ke : mk-l
interlinear_gloss: man-DAT  woman-DAT  offspring-DET  one  gold  great  ruler-DET  give-COP-NMLZ  god-DET
free_translation: To the men and women, the offspring — one portion of gold, great; may it be given to the rulers and gods!
notes: CONJECTURAL. Victory spoils distribution passage. 'nobe' = 'gold' (cert 0.40, from comparative evidence). 'ar' = 'one' (cert 0.35). Pattern: listing captives and tribute.

title: Divine Sanction for the Campaigns
transliteration: apedmk : mk-se : qo : mlo : selele-wi : Tanyidamani : qore-l : pwrite
interlinear_gloss: Apedemak  god-VOC  great  good  protection-DAT  Tanyidamani  ruler-DET  life
free_translation: O Apedemak, great and good god — grant protection and life to Tanyidamani the ruler!
notes: 'Apedemak the god, great and good, protection for Tanyidamani the ruler — life!'

title: Summary of Conquests
transliteration: qore-l : Tanyidamani : qo : to-l : tkke-l : abr-se-l : e-ked : kdi-se-l : erk : mlo
interlinear_gloss: ruler-DET  Tanyidamani  great  land-PL  conquer-DET  man-DET.PL  1SG-slaughter  woman-DET.PL  seize  good
free_translation: Tanyidamani the great ruler conquered lands: he slaughtered the men, he seized the women — it is good!
notes: CONJECTURAL. Summary/victory list structure. Repeats e-ked/erk formulas from Side C in summary form.

title: Thanksgiving to Apedemak
transliteration: apedmk-i : qo : mlo : mk-l : Tanyidamani : qore-l : pwrite : selele-wi : pesto-b-ke
interlinear_gloss: Apedemak-VOC  great  good  god-DET  Tanyidamani  ruler-DET  life  protection-DAT  give-COP-NMLZ
free_translation: O Apedemak, great and good god — may life and protection be given to Tanyidamani the ruler!
notes: 'O Apedemak, great and good god — Tanyidamani the ruler: life, protection, may it be given!'

title: Thanksgiving to the Divine Triad
transliteration: amni : mk-se : wos : mk-se : hore : mk-se : mlo : qo : selele : Tanyidamani : qore-l-o
interlinear_gloss: Amun  god-VOC  Isis  god-VOC  Horus  god-VOC  good  great  protection  Tanyidamani  ruler-DET-GEN
free_translation: O Amun, O god! O Isis, O god! O Horus, O god! — great and good gods, grant protection to Tanyidamani the ruler!
notes: 'Amun the god, Isis the goddess, Horus the god — good, great, protection for Tanyidamani of the kingship'

title: Final Offering Formula
transliteration: ate-li : yi-li : pesto-b-ke : qore-l : Tanyidamani : mk-l : amni-te : mlo-l-owi
interlinear_gloss: bread-PL  water-PL  give-COP-NMLZ  ruler-DET  Tanyidamani  god-DET  Amun-LOC  good-DET-FOCUS
free_translation: Bread and water — may they be offered to Tanyidamani the ruler! At Amun's temple, good gods!
notes: 'Bread and water, may it be given to the ruler Tanyidamani, the gods at Amun's (temple), of goodness'

title: Closing Protocol
transliteration: qore-l-o : Tanyidamani : amni-te : qo : mlo-li : apedmk : mk : wos : mk : tenke : to : selele
interlinear_gloss: ruler-DET-GEN  Tanyidamani  Amun-LOC  great  good-PL  Apedemak  god  Isis  god  west  land  protection
free_translation: Of the ruler Tanyidamani — at Amun's temple, great and good: O Apedemak, O god! O Isis, O god! — protection of the western land!
notes: 'Of the kingship: Tanyidamani, at Amun's (temple), great and good — Apedemak god, Isis goddess, western land, protection'
